'''âz-f-m''' ('''kazafam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lin|lin]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lin|lin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-f-m
|-
! Lemma
| kazafam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizafam|thizafam]] || [[word:jizafam|jizafam]] || [[word:shizafam|shizafam]] || [[word:kizafam|kizafam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzafam|thuthuzafam]] || [[word:jujuzafam|jujuzafam]] || [[word:shushuzafam|shushuzafam]] || [[word:kukuzafam|kukuzafam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzafam|thuzafam]] || [[word:juzafam|juzafam]] || [[word:shuzafam|shuzafam]] || [[word:kuzafam|kuzafam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzafam|thuzafam]] || [[word:juzafam|juzafam]] || [[word:shuzafam|shuzafam]] || [[word:kuzafam|kuzafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezafam|thezafam]] || [[word:jezafam|jezafam]] || [[word:shezafam|shezafam]] || [[word:kezafam|kezafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozafam|thothozafam]] || [[word:jojozafam|jojozafam]] || [[word:shoshozafam|shoshozafam]] || [[word:kokozafam|kokozafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozafam|thozafam]] || [[word:jozafam|jozafam]] || [[word:shozafam|shozafam]] || [[word:kozafam|kozafam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozafam|thozafam]] || [[word:jozafam|jozafam]] || [[word:shozafam|shozafam]] || [[word:kozafam|kozafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzafam|thĂŠzafam]] || [[word:jĂŠzafam|jĂŠzafam]] || [[word:shĂŠzafam|shĂŠzafam]] || [[word:kĂŠzafam|kĂŠzafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazafam|thathazafam]] || [[word:jajazafam|jajazafam]] || [[word:shashazafam|shashazafam]] || [[word:kakazafam|kakazafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazafam|thazafam]] || [[word:jazafam|jazafam]] || [[word:shazafam|shazafam]] || [[word:kazafam|kazafam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazafam|thazafam]] || [[word:jazafam|jazafam]] || [[word:shazafam|shazafam]] || [[word:kazafam|kazafam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazafam|shazafam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazafam|goshazafam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazafam|gokishazafam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazafamnĂŒ|shazafamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazafamnknĂŒ|goshazafamnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazafamnĂŒ|gokishazafamnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazafamshĂ«|shazafamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazafamnkshĂ«|goshazafamnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazafamshĂ«|gokishazafamshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazafamro|shazafamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazafamnkro|goshazafamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazafamro|gokishazafamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazafamu|shazafamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazafamnkmu|goshazafamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazafamu|gokishazafamu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazafamsher|shazafamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazafamnksher|goshazafamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazafamsher|gokishazafamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazafamng|shazafamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazafamnkng|goshazafamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazafamng|gokishazafamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazafamya|shazafamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazafamnkya|goshazafamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazafamya|gokishazafamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazafamyam|shazafamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazafamnkyam|goshazafamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazafamyam|gokishazafamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazafamnĂŒshĂ«|shazafamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazafamnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazafamnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazafamnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazafamnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazafamnĂŒro|shazafamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazafamnknĂŒro|goshazafamnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazafamnĂŒro|gokishazafamnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazafamnĂŒmu|shazafamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazafamnknĂŒmu|goshazafamnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazafamnĂŒmu|gokishazafamnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazafamshĂ«nĂŒ|shazafamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazafamnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazafamnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazafamshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazafamshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazafamshĂ«ro|shazafamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazafamnkshĂ«ro|goshazafamnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazafamshĂ«ro|gokishazafamshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazafamshĂ«mu|shazafamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazafamnkshĂ«mu|goshazafamnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazafamshĂ«mu|gokishazafamshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazafamronĂŒ|shazafamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazafamnkronĂŒ|goshazafamnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazafamronĂŒ|gokishazafamronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazafamroshĂ«|shazafamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazafamnkroshĂ«|goshazafamnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazafamroshĂ«|gokishazafamroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazafamromu|shazafamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazafamnkromu|goshazafamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazafamromu|gokishazafamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazafamunĂŒ|shazafamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazafamnkmunĂŒ|goshazafamnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazafamunĂŒ|gokishazafamunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazafamushĂ«|shazafamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazafamnkmushĂ«|goshazafamnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazafamushĂ«|gokishazafamushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazafamuro|shazafamuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazafamnkmuro|goshazafamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazafamuro|gokishazafamuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
